allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d.get\('main',''\), d.get\('module',''\), d.get\('exports',''\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const pkg = require\('./node_modules/animejs/package.json'\); console.log\('main:', pkg.main\); console.log\('module:', pkg.module\); console.log\('exports keys:', JSON.stringify\(Object.keys\(pkg.exports || {}\)\)\)")
